description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6 Docker image and defines two stages: test and upload. Apply a global before_script that runs `pip install pipenv` followed by `pipenv install -d --system` for all jobs. In the test stage add a lint-code job that executes `make lint`, and a run-test job that executes `make pytest`. In the upload stage add an upload-to-pypi job with its own before_script `pip install twine`, then runs `python setup.py bdist_wheel` and `twine upload dist/*`, and configure it to run only on tag pushes. No services, caches, or artifacts are defined.
